description: Create a Classic Splunk Dashboard named 'NOC_System_Health_Wallboard' to visualize system errors and log trends (Login: http://localhost:8000, username: 'admin', password: 'SplunkAdmin1!'). The dashboard must include a 'System Errors by Host' panel using a color-coded Single Value visualization in a Trellis layout split by host based on the search `index=system_logs ("error" OR "fail*" OR "fatal" OR "warn*") | stats count by host`. It must also include a 'Log Volume Trend' panel using a Stacked Column or Area Chart based on the search `index=system_logs | timechart count by host`. Do not use Dashboard Studio.
